  "findings": [
    "F3125 Grade A325 bolt head markings match the drawing callout",
    "Squirter-style DTI washers show fully extruded silicone at all bumps, indicating proper pretension",
    "Match marks show consistent nut rotation across the connection",
    "No thread run-out is present in the shear plane"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Document the inspection results in the daily structural inspection report",
    "Approve the connection for subsequent construction phases"
  ],
  "rationale": "The connection meets all requirements of the RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts. The correct bolt grade is installed, the thread run-out is clear of the shear plane, and the fully extruded silicone on the Squirter DTIs, combined with consistent match-mark rotation, verifies that the required pretension has been achieved.",
  "references": [
    "RCSC Specification for Structural Joints Using High-Strength Bolts, Section 8.2.4 (Direct-Tension-Indicator Pretensioning)",
    "ASTM F3125 / F3125M"
  ]
}
